'''Rakririan Burnout Sauce''' was a spicy sauce, capable of burning mouths and throats if used in sizable quantities, due mainly to the use of "meltdown spice", which was actually made of a liquid petrochem fuel. As such, most sentients used it in trace amounts.

==History==
{{Talesstart}}
In spite of its effects, the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] was once known to have used a large amount to sabotage a dish in order to create a diversion while on a Jedi mission.
{{Talesend}}
